title: MACOS APP IS OUT NOW
content: Now enjoy the MacOs software because it is out! XD

title: Music
content: Now users can enjoy music and focus at the same time! We have a music player with a variety of music genres to choose from.

title: Guild, Achievements and Friends
content: Now users can create guilds, manage the people and chat with the people in the guids. The pomodoro has been optimised as well. The pomodoro timer will be saved automatically even when you are away. Within 30 minutes of finishing, you can get both coins and the time stats. Otherwise you only get stats. So make sure to come back! :)

title: AVATAR_SQUASH_HOTFIX
content: Patched all of the the bugs reported by the beta testers: Chinese toggle, Tiny Haven crowded furniture, pomodoro and friends bugs.

title: POMODORO_SYSTEM_BOOT
content: The app is launched with its basic features such as pomodoro, adding tasks, adding calendar events and the tiny haven.
